title: mirabilis exaltata
intro: Mirabilis exaltata, also known as the tall four o'clock, is a species of flowering plant in the four o'clock family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, mirabilis exaltata is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties.
